title: Fix MULTIDRIVEN with task and default driver (#4045)
body:
Per the end of #4045:

Treat “task definition” as not a process (don’t set the who/where the writer was), so figure out how to gate this appropriately.
Treat “call site” as part of the caller’s process (iterate/descend through the statements of the task setting who/where writer as appropriate).

I created V3UndrivenCapture to hold the state, and an enable to disable the new behaviour if desired.  Added a bunch of tests and alot of comments in V3UndrivenCapture.h itself.
